valid.name: anchored-prefix
valid.code: SELECT id FROM users WHERE email LIKE 'admin@%';

valid.name: equals
valid.code: SELECT id FROM users WHERE email = 'admin@example.com';

invalid.name: leading-wildcard-ilike
invalid.code: SELECT id FROM users WHERE name ILIKE '%smith%';

errors.message: `LIKE`/`ILIKE` patterns that begin with `%` cannot use a B-tree index and force a sequential scan. If you need substring search, use a `pg_trgm` GIN index, full-text search, or rework the schema so the prefix is indexable.

invalid.name: leading-wildcard
invalid.code: SELECT id FROM users WHERE email LIKE '%@example.com';

errors.message: `LIKE`/`ILIKE` patterns that begin with `%` cannot use a B-tree index and force a sequential scan. If you need substring search, use a `pg_trgm` GIN index, full-text search, or rework the schema so the prefix is indexable.
